reviews.review_title: Good game but, you need modes...
reviews.review_description: Hi, I very much enjoy this game, however there should be easy, medium & hard modes. Easy having less obstacles in the path, so that people can get used to the controls. Also when the big, spiky gem is out of sight so you quickly bounce into the other lane, yet die, It's very annoying.  Also, once an object is out of your sight line, you shoud be able to move freely without that object holding  you back. The big spiky gem does this. I can't see it anymore however when I move to another lane, it takes me out.
Brilliant! As a fat man trying to lose some weight, this is the perfect level of exercise and addictiveness to be extremely useful to me, looking forward to any updates!
Simple and addictive fun. Shout out the devs for their generosity in providing free codes for a giveaway! I've included it on my video list of top 10 App Lab games: https://youtu.be/Peq49fV911Y

reviews.review_title: Got a code from Reddit thanks!
reviews.review_description: This is a biased review since I got it for free :)
